findings.message: hardcoded_api_key detected in apps/auth/src/services/login_service.py:20. Load secrets via the secrets broker, never inline.
findings.suggestion: Replace the literal with a `secret.get(name)` call and wire the secret through the tenant policy.

findings.message: eval_call detected in apps/auth/src/services/login_service.py:27. These bypass the agent audit boundary.
findings.suggestion: Refactor to an explicit API call that the audit log can capture.

findings.message: possible SQL injection vector in apps/auth/src/services/login_service.py:22. SQL must use parameterized statements.
findings.suggestion: Use a parameterized statement (cursor.execute(sql, params)) or an ORM query.

findings.message: no test file found for apps/auth/src/services/login_service.py. Implementation without tests blocks merge.
findings.suggestion: Add apps/<service>/test/unit/login_test.py with at least one happy-path test.
